summary: Frontend-only verification of new Calls tab, Analytics enhancements (campaign names + Type col + By Sitelink + Sync names), and lead delete (row + modal). Logged into /admin (blank username, password LemonPros2026!) and exercised every check from review_request. All 7 review_request checks PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.jsx still ~500 lines mixing leads list + lead modal + revenue logic. Consider extracting LeadDetailDialog and the row-delete handler into separate modules for clarity/testability.

Row-delete and modal-delete both use window.confirm(); for a production UI consider replacing with a Shadcn AlertDialog so the confirmation matches the rest of the dashboard's styling and is testable without monkey-patching window.confirm.
Submit Test Lead is publicly exposed in owner mode; ensure backend gates this to authenticated owners only (out of scope here, just flagging).
test_credentials: Admin owner: username blank, password 'LemonPros2026!' — verified working.
seed_data_creation: Submitted one test lead ('Taylor Brown', 2023 Ford F-150) via the Submit Test Lead button to exercise the View + delete flows. Did not actually delete (confirm dialog dismissed). One TEST lead remains in DB after the run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All review_request items verified on https://lemon-checker.preview.emergentagent.com . Tabs visible: Hooks, Analytics, Calls, Leads, Settings (Metrics + Media Buying confirmed removed). Analytics 'By Campaign' headers = ['Campaign','Type','Clicks','Leads','Conv. Rate','Bounce Rate']; first row shows 'Lemon Law 2026' + '#23956437547' and Type 'Search' — names ARE being rendered, not just numeric IDs. Sections present: analytics-by-campaign, analytics-by-adgroup, analytics-by-ad, analytics-by-keyword, analytics-by-sitelink. analytics-sync-google button click produced toast 'Synced 29 campaigns & 1205 ad groups from Google Ads.'. Calls tab headers = [Caller, Number, Duration, Campaign, Keyword, Location, When, Actions]; the preview DB actually has 2 call rows now (so empty-state was not displayed — that's expected, the empty-state code path is still in /app/frontend/src/components/admin/AdminCalls.jsx:86 keyed on calls-empty). Leads row exposes both admin-lead-open-<id> (View) and admin-lead-delete-<id> (red trash icon, lucide-trash-2). Both delete entrypoints call window.confirm with message: 'Delete lead "<name>"? This cannot be undone.' Lead-detail modal shows Vehicle Year/Make/Model, Phone, Email, Address, Zip, Location, Campaign ID, Ad Group ID, Ad ID, Keyword, GCLID, Submitted — no Homeowner/Issue/Service fields. data-testids verified: admin-tab-{leads,hooks,analytics,calls,settings}, analytics-sync-google, analytics-by-{campaign,adgroup,ad,keyword,sitelink}, admin-calls, calls-refresh, admin-lead-open-<id>, admin-lead-delete-<id>, lead-delete-button, lead-detail-car-year.
rca of the issue: N/A — no regressions found. All recently-added features render and behave as described in the review_request.
